<big><center>'''''This may not be the Gunpla you're looking for. Are you looking for the [[MG ASW-G-08 Gundam Barbatos|Master Grade kit]] instead?'''''</center></big>
{{Plamo_Infobox|image = 1-100-Gundam-Barbatos-boxart.jpg|Classification = 1/100 IRON-BLOODED ORPHANS|Lineup no. = 01|Scale = 1/100|Franchise = Mobile Suit Gundam IRON-BLOODED ORPHANS|Release Date = November 26, 2015|Price = ¥2,500 {{refyentax}}|JAN/ISBN = 4549660018865|Need glue? = No|Materials = PS,PE|Run = Standard|Japanese Name=1/100 ガンダムバルバトス|Model of=ASW-G-08 Gundam Barbatos}}The [[1/100 IRON-BLOODED ORPHANS]] (NG IBO) '''ASW-G-08 Gundam Barbatos''' is a 1/100 scale kit released in 2015.

== Includes==

*Gundam Barbatos
**2 gray backpack arm pieces (extended)
**Manipulators
***Weapon-holding (1 pair)
***Open-palm (1 pair)
*Long Sword
* Smooth-bore Gun
*Sub-arms for Backpack
**1 Long
**1 Short 
*Adapter for Long Sword
*Adapter for Action Base

==Kit Features & Gimmicks==

=== Articulation ===

*The head can swivel on a ball-and-socket neck joint.
*The torso can tilt forwards, or sideways (with functioning pistons).
*The arms can...
**Swivel on a ball-and-socket joint.
**Raise horizontally.
*The upper arms can rotate.
*Elbow joints can be bent up to 120 degrees.
*The manipulators can swivel on a ball-and-socket joint.
*The waist can rotate 360 degrees.
* The hip joint axis can swing frontward/backwards on one side.
* The upper thigh joints can swing frontwards (and backwards in some extent) on a peg-and-socket joint, raise horizontally, and/or rotate on each piece.
**Front and side skirt armors can lift up to provide clearance.
*The knees are double-jointed.
*Ankle joints can pivot and/or slightly tilt.

=== Weapons/Other Gimmicks ===
*Armor can be attached or removed from the Gundam Frame. (Some parts required swapping.)
*The hands are swappable.
*Any of the weapons can be wielded by the default weapon-holding hands.
**The weapon handles/hilts and the palms feature molded tabs and tab holes for increased gripping stability.
* Long Sword can be mounted on the backpack with an adapter.
*Backpack arms can be attached to the sub-arms (long and short).  
**The Backpack Arms' grey parts can be swapped with the alternate pieces.
* The Smooth-bore gun can be...
**Folded into either storage or firing modes.
**Mounted on either of the backpack arms.
***If one rearranged into firing mode, the gray pieces must be swapped first.
*Gundam Barbatos can mount onto [[Action Base]]<nowiki/>s 1 or 4 via an adapter.
**If one is inclined, the adapter's panels can be shortened by trimming the pieces off. (Note: may be unstable if trimmed too much.)

==Tips and Tricks ==
* For better results, some or most of the details are needed to be applied with Gundam Markers or Mr. Color paints.
* Topcoat (Mr. Hobby recommended) can be used to protect applied stickers and if any, marking decals and painted details.
*The included 1st Form left arm parts and the Shoulder Armors from the [[1/100 EB-06 Graze]] (sold separately) can be attached to this kit to form Gundam Barbatos 1st/2nd form.
*The Wire hook from the [[1/100 EB-05S Schwalbe Graze (McGillis Fareed Custom)|1/100 McGillis' Schwalbe Graze]] (sold separately) can also attach onto the 1st form left arm parts to recreate Gundam Barbatos' 3rd form.

==Notes & Trivia==
*The Mace is separately released with with the [[1/100 ASW-G-08 Gundam Barbatos 6th Form|1/100 Gundam Barbatos 6th form]] kit.
